title: bus.hearth.wave.gate.responded v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's reactor when the Android app responds to a wave gate prompt (advance or reopen). Wave gates pause the session until the human explicitly authorizes the next step.

wave_name.description: Name of the wave whose gate is being responded to.

action.description: Whether to advance to the next wave or reopen a previously closed one.

note.description: Optional free-text note attached to the response.

responded_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the wave gate response was recorded.
